'''Merciless''' was a [[Massiff/Legends|massiff]] owned by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Kedar Blackgate]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sacorria]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Blackgate owned a second massiff, named [[Emperor (massiff)|Emperor]], and both were said to be loyal pets.<ref name="CCW" />
